artifacts.title: Time receipt from 2021-06-30
artifacts.excerpt:
"Time heals all wounds"
No it doesn't
All time does is give you more and more distance from the wounds. It gives you opportunities to layer more and more coping mechanisms over the original wound
This just gives you more to unlearn if you do ever want to heal
